hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
blocked = ['zz_generated', 'config/crd/bases/', 'config/rbac/role.yaml', 'config/webhook/manifests.yaml', 'PROJECT']
if any(b in path for b in blocked):
    print(f'BLOCKED: {path} is auto-generated. Run: mise run manifests or mise run generate', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
"

python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if path.endswith('.go'):
    result = subprocess.run(['mise', 'run', 'lint-fix'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        output = result.stdout or result.stderr
        print(output[-1000:] if len(output) > 1000 else output)
"
